title: 熊猫布布便携恒温杯 tips for calmer night feeds
subtitle: Warm milk by the bedside, in minutes
voiceover_20s: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough? No convenient hot water when baby wakes up hungry. USB-C rechargeable thermos cup — warm milk by the bed, pour when ready. Warm milk poured out ready for the bottle — without leaving the room. Save this for your next night feed.

storyboard.visual: 夜间卧室喂奶：近景口播/问题特写
storyboard.voiceover_en: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough?
storyboard.subtitle_en: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough?
storyboard.visual_prompt: 夜间卧室喂奶：近景口播/问题特写；产品：熊猫布布便携恒温杯；人群：0-12月新手爸妈；场景：夜间卧室喂奶（全片统一，禁止混入其他场景）；产品为可充电加热保温杯（独立于奶瓶的圆柱暖奶容器，非奶瓶暖奶器）；用法：从储奶袋或家用奶瓶经翻开顶盖倒入杯内加热保温，再倾斜杯身经盖面圆孔出液嘴倒出到干净奶瓶喂哺；禁止：把奶瓶放进杯内、从宽口直倒（必须经过圆孔出液嘴）、奶瓶浸在杯中加热；进液来源仅限：储奶袋（母乳储存袋）或家里日常使用的婴儿奶瓶倒奶；禁止出现：市售牛奶塑料瓶、鲜奶纸盒/利乐包、酸奶杯、任意商超乳制品包装；结构严格对照产品参考图：顶部为翻盖式铰链盖（侧面浅紫矩形按键弹开），非螺旋旋盖；倒出口为盖面碗形凹槽内的小圆孔出液嘴，倾斜杯身时暖奶从此圆孔流出；进液经翻开顶盖倒入杯内腔体；盖下深紫装饰环 nurture wise 标识；下段竖向数显屏（华氏度 °F 温度，典型约 98°F，禁止摄氏度）；数显旁椭圆形 recessed 电源键；底部 recessed 充电口（硅胶盖内，非杯身侧面 USB 口）；禁止画成：圆顶旋盖、宽口直倒、杯身侧面充电口、奶瓶放入杯内；数显温度单位为华氏度（°F），禁止显示摄氏度（°C）；出口版典型读数约 98°F（接近体温的舒适温奶，非沸水）；屏上须带 °F 标识，不得把 98 画成 98°C 或仅写 98 无单位；母乳/配方奶为温热状态（body-warm），倒奶时液体平稳流出；禁止：烧开冒热气、大量白色蒸汽、沸腾起泡、火苗加热、滚烫发红液体；竖屏9:16
storyboard.seedance_prompt: Hook opening, nighttime nursery bedroom feeding, same approved caregiver as reference: 女性角色-照护者-01; wardrobe cream chunky ribbed knit sweater, light-wash straight-leg jeans, white sneakers; match likeness and realistic hand physics, medium shot holding portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, flip-top hinged lid with integrated circular pour spout hole in bowl-shaped lid recess, light-purple lid release button, nurture wise band, vertical digital Fahrenheit °F display showing ~98°F, pour-spout reference photo beside separate baby bottle on bedside table, warm soft light, subtle push-in, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style, no medical claim, same person identity across all shots, motivated key light, soft shadows, natural reflections, realistic exposure, match white-background hero product appearance exactly, no redesign; physics-safe pour and hand motion; scenario-consistent props. Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour body-warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; Fahrenheit °F display ~98°F only, no °C; no steam or boiling; never put bottle inside cup; match white-background hero and pour-spout reference exactly. Mood: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough?

Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour body-warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; Fahrenheit °F display ~98°F only, no °C; no steam or boiling; never put bottle inside cup; match white-background hero and pour-spout reference exactly. Mood: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough?

Problem moment, nighttime nursery bedroom feeding, same approved caregiver as reference: 女性角色-照护者-01; wardrobe cream chunky ribbed knit sweater, light-wash straight-leg jeans, white sneakers; match likeness and realistic hand physics, frustrated with cold milk in baby bottle, bulky old bottle warmer in background, moody lighting, realistic hand physics, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style, no medical claim, same person identity across all shots, motivated key light, soft shadows, natural reflections, realistic exposure, match white-background hero product appearance exactly, no redesign; physics-safe pour and hand motion; scenario-consistent props. Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour body-warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; Fahrenheit °F display ~98°F only, no °C; no steam or boiling; never put bottle inside cup; match white-background hero and pour-spout reference exactly. No convenient hot water when baby wakes up hungry.

Product demo, nighttime nursery bedroom feeding, same approved caregiver as reference: 女性角色-照护者-01; wardrobe cream chunky ribbed knit sweater, light-wash straight-leg jeans, white sneakers; match likeness and realistic hand physics, side angle — flip-top lid open, pour milk INTO portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, flip-top hinged lid with integrated circular pour spout hole in bowl-shaped lid recess, light-purple lid release button, nurture wise band, vertical digital Fahrenheit °F display showing ~98°F, pour-spout reference photo, tilt to pour warm milk OUT from lid spout into baby feeding bottle, realistic pour physics, vertical display visible, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style, no medical claim, same person identity across all shots, motivated key light, soft shadows, natural reflections, realistic exposure, match white-background hero product appearance exactly, no redesign; physics-safe pour and hand motion; scenario-consistent props. Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour body-warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; Fahrenheit °F display ~98°F only, no °C; no steam or boiling; never put bottle inside cup; match white-background hero and pour-spout reference exactly. STRUCTURE (match pour-spout product reference exactly): flip-top hinged lid on top with light-purple side release button, NOT a screw cap; integrated POUR OUTLET is a small circular spout hole inside a bowl-shaped recess on the lid — when cup is tilted, warm milk streams OUT thro. USB-C rechargeable thermos cup — warm milk by the bed, pour when ready.

Proof detail, nighttime nursery bedroom feeding, macro shot of body-warm milk pouring OUT from lid spout of portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, flip-top hinged lid with integrated circular pour spout hole in bowl-shaped lid recess, light-purple lid release button, nurture wise band, vertical digital Fahrenheit °F display showing ~98°F, pour-spout reference photo into baby feeding bottle, no steam plume or boiling bubbles, hinged lid open, no person face, no medical claim, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style, motivated key light, soft shadows, natural reflections, realistic exposure, match white-background hero product appearance exactly, no redesign; physics-safe pour and hand motion; scenario-consistent props. shot_asset_map.dialogue_or_subtitle: USB-C rechargeable thermos cup — warm milk by the bed, pour when ready.
shot_asset_map.visual_description: 夜间卧室喂奶：储奶袋/家用奶瓶经翻盖倒入杯内加热，倾斜经盖面圆孔出液嘴倒入干净奶瓶（便携可充电设计；产品为可充电加热保温杯（独立于奶瓶的圆柱暖奶容器，非奶瓶暖奶器）；用法：从储奶袋或家用奶瓶经翻开顶盖倒入杯内加热保温，再倾斜杯身经盖面圆孔出液嘴倒出到干净奶瓶喂哺；禁止：把奶瓶放进杯内、从宽口直倒（必须经过圆孔出液嘴）、奶瓶浸在杯中加热）
shot_asset_map.asset_path_or_status: 01_素材库/人像角色/女性角色-照护者-01/side.png

STRUCTURE (match pour-spout product reference exactly): flip-top hinged lid on top with light-purple side release button, NOT a screw cap; integrated POUR OUTLET is a small circular spout hole inside a bowl-shaped recess on the lid — when cup is tilted, warm milk streams OUT thro. production_fidelity.physics_rule: No impossible pours, wrong container relationships, reversed gravity, or usage-scene mismatch.
production_fidelity.person_rule: Same person profile across all person-visible shots in one video.

production_fidelity.new_category_rule: New products require white hero + scenario images + detail images before scripting or generation.
production_fidelity.temperature_display_rule: Fahrenheit °F only on display (~98°F typical); never Celsius °C.
production_fidelity.milk_physics_rule: Body-warm breast milk/formula pour only; no boiling, steam plume, or bubbling hot liquid.
